sheets.name: Inputs
sheets.purpose: All model assumptions and settings. User/platform editable.

inputs.label: Max Debt (% of Dev Cost incl. Land)

sheets.name: Program
sheets.purpose: Asset table (30 assets × 20+ columns). Platform fills from project assets.

sheets.name: CAPEX
sheets.purpose: Year-by-year cost schedule. 100% formulas - reads from Program + Inputs.

sheets.name: Revenue
sheets.purpose: Year-by-year income schedule. 100% formulas - reads from Program + Inputs.

sheets.name: CashFlow
sheets.purpose: Per-phase and consolidated unlevered cash flows. 100% formulas.

sheets.name: Operating_PL
sheets.purpose: Hotel and Marina P&L assumptions. Platform fills from asset config.

inputs.label: Fixed Charges % of Rev  تكاليف ثابتة

sheets.name: Fund_Summary
sheets.purpose: Dashboard aggregating all Fund sheets. 100% formulas.

sheets.name: Fund_ZAN 1
sheets.purpose: Phase 1 fund: capital structure, debt, fees, waterfall, returns.

sheets.name: Bank
sheets.purpose: Bank submission model: aggregated debt, DSCR, sources & uses.

sheets.name: 9_Checks
sheets.purpose: Consolidated model integrity checks (24 automated tests).
